title: Classify and revalidate long-lived backlog tasks
goal: Classify later-lane tasks before any bulk cleanup and record why each sampled task still exists.

acceptance.assertion: Each reviewed task receives last_revalidated_at, revalidation_due_at, current persistence reason, origin and next trigger or an equivalent normalized record.
Classification distinguishes keep, supersession candidate, archive candidate and deletion candidate without applying bulk deletion.
A bounded representative sample is reviewed before schema-wide or queue-wide changes.
The task does not rewrite all later tasks merely to satisfy metadata shape.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
